// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Ryn.Ipc;

namespace TestApp;

file sealed class NullableCommandsRouter : ICommandRouter
{
    public bool CanRoute(string command) => command is "format";

    public async ValueTask<string> RouteAsync(
        string command, ReadOnlyMemory<byte> args, IServiceProvider services, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        switch (command)
        {
            case "format":
            {
                using var __doc = JsonDocument.Parse(args);
                var __root = __doc.RootElement;
                var __prop0 = __root.GetProperty("value");
                var __p0 = __prop0.ValueKind == System.Text.Json.JsonValueKind.Null ? (int?)null : __prop0.GetInt32();
                var __result = global::TestApp.NullableCommands.Format(__p0);
                return __ToJson(__result);
            }
            default:
                throw new RynCommandNotFoundException(command);
        }
    }

    private static string __ToJson(string value) =>
        "\"" + value.Replace("\\", "\\\\", System.StringComparison.Ordinal).Replace("\"", "\\\"", System.StringComparison.Ordinal) + "\"";
}

public static class NullableCommandsRynExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddNullableCommands(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<ICommandRouter, NullableCommandsRouter>();
        return services;
    }
}
